requirement_topic.en: EGAT Mandatory Energy Label and Star Rating Communication
requirement_topic.zh: EGAT 强制能效标签与五星级展示
requirement_topic.zht: EGAT 強制能效標籤與五星級展示

summary.en: Thailand requires mandatory energy labelling for many cooling and heat pump appliances under EGAT and related public-facing programs. The framework is commonly implemented through star rating disclosure at point of sale and catalog level, with performance communication tied to declared seasonal efficiency and operating performance conditions.
summary.zh: 泰国对多数制冷与热泵类产品要求强制能效标签，通常由EGAT及相关执行体系实施，并在销售和目录中以星级形式披露。性能展示需与公布的季节工况和运行效率条件对应。
summary.zht: 泰國對多數制冷與熱泵類產品要求強制能效標籤，通常由EGAT及相關執行體系實施，並在銷售和目錄中以星級形式披露。性能展示需與公佈的季節工況和運行效率條件對應。

standards_or_laws: MEA / PEA energy information requirements for cooling appliances
Thailand star-rating model used in consumer-facing labeling

summary.en: China energy labels use China-specific scales, test conditions, and declaration formatting. These do not replace EGAT star-labelling expectations, and direct translation or reuse of Chinese label values can misstate Thai consumer communication requirements.
summary.zh: 中国能效标识采用中国特有的等级、试验工况和声明格式，不能直接替代EGAT的五星级标签要求，中国标签值直接转换通常会误导泰国消费者披露。
summary.zht: 中國能效標識採用中國特有的等級、試驗工況和聲明格式，不能直接替代EGAT的五星級標籤要求，中國標籤值直接轉換通常會誤導泰國消費者披露。

gap.en: A gap exists at labeling content and format level. Sales packaging and online sales materials for Thailand markets need EGAT-compliant label content and proof structure, not only translated Chinese labels. Data models, units, and performance definitions need Thai market alignment.
gap.zh: 在标签内容与格式层面存在差距。面向泰国市场的包装和网售资料需使用EGAT合规的标签内容和证明结构，而非仅翻译中国标签；数据模型、单位和性能定义需按泰国市场重新对齐。
gap.zht: 在標籤內容與格式層面存在差距。面向泰國市場的包裝和網售資料需使用EGAT合規的標籤內容和證明結構，而非僅翻譯中國標籤；數據模型、單位和性能定義需按泰國市場重新對齊。

mandatory_status.target: mandatory where EGAT labeling scope covers the appliance category
mandatory_status.cn: mandatory for China domestic energy labels in domestic sales only

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Thailand-facing labeling gap — EGAT consumer label structure and star categories must be produced in Thailand format; Chinese label values are not sufficient by themselves.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 泰国标签差距——需按EGAT销售标签结构和星级类别单独制备；中国标签数据本身不充分。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 泰國標籤差距——需按EGAT銷售標籤結構和星級類別單獨製備；中國標籤數據本身不充分。

requirement_topic.en: EPPO Energy Efficiency Policy and MEPS Threshold Direction
requirement_topic.zh: EPPO能效政策与最低能效标准门槛方向
requirement_topic.zht: EPPO能效政策與最低能效標準門檻方向

summary.en: Thailand energy policy direction (EPPO and relevant ministries) references minimum performance guidance where EER and COP thresholds are published over time for certain capacity bands. Import planning should align model performance declarations with the latest EPPO/market guidance and MEPS direction for eligible air-source heat pump appliances.
summary.zh: 泰国能源政策方向（EPPO及相关部委）对某些功率段产品发布EER和COP基准阈值。进口前应将机型性能声明与最新EPPO/市场导向和MEPS门槛保持一致，覆盖合规电器范围。
summary.zht: 泰國能源政策方向（EPPO及相關部委）對某些功率段產品發布EER和COP基準閾值。進口前應將機型性能聲明與最新EPPO/市場導向和MEPS門檻保持一致，覆蓋合規電器範圍。

standards_or_laws: Energy Policy and Planning Office (EPPO) efficiency direction
Thai Ministry of Energy programs and sectoral MEPS announcements
EGAT-anchored market communication on heat pump efficiency classes

summary.en: China applies its own energy-label classes and declared methods (for example GB 21455 and related efficiency metrics), which are not identical in threshold definitions and reporting logic to Thailand MEPS direction. Alignment is required before claiming Thai compliance or market-ready marketing claims.
summary.zh: 中国有自己的一体化能效等级与计算方法（如GB 21455及相关效率指标），其阈值定义和报送逻辑与泰国MEPS方向不完全一致。必须在宣称泰国合规前进行对齐。
summary.zht: 中國有自己的一體化能效等級與計算方法（如GB 21455及相關效率指標），其閾值定義和申報邏輯與泰國MEPS方向不完全一致。必須在聲明泰國合規前進行對齊。

gap.en: The gap is mainly policy alignment. Even where product test basis is similar, threshold references and reporting classes can differ. Thai importers should verify latest EPPO or line-ministry notices before final label placement and trade publication.
gap.zh: 差距主要在于政策对齐。即使测试基础相似，阈值引用和报告等级也可能不同。泰国进口商应在最终贴标和销售发布前核实最新EPPO及相关部委通知。
gap.zht: 差距主要在於政策對齊。即使測試基礎相似，閾值引用和報告等級也可能不同。泰國進口商應在最終貼標和銷售發布前核實最新EPPO及相關部委通知。

mandatory_status.target: mandatory where a MEPS-aligned class or threshold is currently applied to the product segment
mandatory_status.cn: mandatory for Chinese domestic labeling in domestic market only

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Directional gap — EPPO and MEPS-aligned efficiency thresholds must be checked for Thailand product classes before publication; Chinese threshold tables are not directly transferrable.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 政策方向差距——需在发布前核验泰国产品类别对应的EPPO与MEPS阈值，中国阈值表不能直接套用。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 政策方向差距——需在發布前核驗泰國產品類別對應的EPPO與MEPS閾值，中國閾值表不能直接套用。
